message:
fix(storage): explicit close_in_place in backup and schema check paths

Ensure FrankenSQLite connections opened for backup and schema checking
are explicitly closed rather than relying on Drop, which logs a
drop_close diagnostic in production:

Backup (create_backup):
- Call conn.close_in_place() after VACUUM INTO completes
- If close_in_place() fails, fall back to close_best_effort_in_place()
  with a warning log rather than propagating the close error (the backup
  itself succeeded)
- Take &mut conn since close_in_place requires mutable access

Schema check (check_schema_compatibility):
- Wrap entire query sequence in a closure so conn.close_in_place() runs
  in a finally-equivalent block regardless of success or failure
- Fall back to close_best_effort_in_place() on close error
- Import params_from_iter for the new closure pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
